name: codebadger
desc: 🦡 codebadger is a containerized Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI agents and LLMs deep, queryable access to a codebase's structure and data fl…
descFull: 🦡 codebadger is a containerized Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI agents and LLMs deep, queryable access to a codebase's structure and data flow through Joern Code Property Graphs (CPGs).
